data.description:
Casting Time: 1 action
Range: 120 feet
Components: V, S
Duration: Instantaneous
You sense the presence of any trap within range that is in line sight. This spell would reveal anything that includes anything that is intended as a sudden or unexpected effect, including mechanical traps or glyphs of warding, but it does not reveal natural features such as an unstable ceiling or hidden sinkhole.
Thus, the spell would sense an area affected by the alarm spell, a glyph of warding, a pit trap, or a mechanical trap, but it would not reveal that a floor is unstable or a sinkhole is hidden. This merely reveals the presence of a trap and the general nature of the danger posed by a trap.
